title: The Absent Author
desc: A famous mystery writer vanishes before his book signing — but is it a real kidnapping? ✍️

q.en: Who is the famous mystery writer that Dink invites to Green Lawn?
q.zh: 丁克邀请到绿草坪镇来的著名推理作家是谁？

explain.en: Dink invites Wallis Wallace, the most famous mystery writer in the world, to sign books at the Book Nook.
explain.zh: 丁克邀请了世界上最著名的推理作家沃利斯·华莱士，到书店为读者签书。

q.en: What is Dink's full real name?
q.zh: 丁克真正的全名是什么？

explain.en: Dink's full name is Donald David Duncan, but everyone just calls him Dink.
explain.zh: 丁克的全名是唐纳德·大卫·邓肯，但大家都只叫他丁克。

q.en: What is unusual about how Ruth Rose dresses?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝的穿着有什么特别之处？

options.en: She wears all one color every day
options.zh: 她每天都穿同一种颜色

options.en: She wears a hat with feathers
options.zh: 她戴一顶有羽毛的帽子

explain.en: Ruth Rose is always dressed all in one color — on the day of the signing, it was purple.
explain.zh: 露丝·罗丝总是全身上下穿同一种颜色——签书会那天她穿了一身紫色。

q.en: What line in Wallis Wallace's letter made Dink think he'd been kidnapped?
q.zh: 华莱士信里的哪句话让丁克以为他被人绑架了？

options.en: Short of being kidnapped, nothing will stop me
options.zh: “除非被人绑架，否则什么也拦不住我”

options.en: I will send you my picture
I live in a castle in Maine
options.zh: “我住在缅因州的一座城堡里”

options.en: I am writing a new book

explain.en: The letter said 'Short of being kidnapped, nothing will stop me from coming,' which made Dink worry when he didn't show up.
explain.zh: 信里说“除非被人绑架，否则什么也拦不住我前来”，所以当华莱士没出现时，丁克担心他真的被绑架了。

q.en: Who drove Wallis Wallace from the airport to the hotel in a taxi?
q.zh: 是谁开出租车把华莱士从机场送到了酒店？

explain.en: Maureen Higgins, a taxi driver, picked Wallis Wallace up at the airport and dropped him at the Shangri-La Hotel.
explain.zh: 出租车司机莫琳·希金斯在机场接上华莱士，把他送到了香格里拉酒店。

q.en: At which hotel did Wallis Wallace check in?
q.zh: 华莱士入住的是哪家酒店？

explain.en: Wallis Wallace's itinerary shows he checked into the Shangri-La Hotel after the taxi ride.
explain.zh: 华莱士的行程单显示，他坐出租车之后入住的是香格里拉酒店。

q.en: Which room had a 'Do Not Disturb' sign and was never cleaned by the maid?
q.zh: 哪个房间挂着“请勿打扰”的牌子，连女佣都没进去打扫过？

explain.en: The maid Livvy said Room 302 had a Do Not Disturb sign, so she never went inside it.
explain.zh: 女佣利维说302房间挂着“请勿打扰”的牌子，所以她从没进去打扫过。

q.en: Who was the man tied up in Room 302 saying 'HELP'?
q.zh: 被绑在302房间里喊“救命”的男人是谁？

options.zh: 沃克·华莱士，华莱士的哥哥

explain.en: The tied-up man was Walker Wallace, Wallis Wallace's brother, helping with her fake kidnapping.
explain.zh: 那个被绑的男人是沃克·华莱士，也就是华莱士的哥哥，在配合她假绑架的计划。

q.en: What did Ruth Rose notice about Mavis Green's red scarf that gave her away?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝注意到梅维斯·格林的红围巾上有什么破绽？

options.en: The tiny letters were W's for Wallis Wallace, not M's
options.zh: 小字母其实是华莱士的W，不是M

explain.en: Ruth Rose turned the scarf upside down and the tiny letters became W's — for Wallis Wallace, not M for Mavis.
explain.zh: 露丝把围巾倒过来，发现那些小字母变成了W——代表华莱士，而不是M代表梅维斯。

q.en: Why did Wallis Wallace fake her own kidnapping?
q.zh: 华莱士为什么要假装自己被绑架？

options.en: To research her new book about a kidnapped children's writer
options.zh: 为了给写“儿童作家被绑架”的新书收集素材

options.en: She wanted to rob a bank
She wanted to move to Green Lawn

explain.en: She faked it to see how real kids would solve a kidnapping mystery for her new book's research.
explain.zh: 她假绑架是为了观察真实的孩子会怎样破解绑架谜案，为自己的新书做研究。
